# CWE-640: Weak Password Recovery Mechanism (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-640-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

// Vulnerable: resets password using only the email address as proof of identity.
func ForgotPassword(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	email := r.FormValue("email")
	newPass := r.FormValue("new_password")
	res, err := db.Exec("UPDATE users SET password = $1 WHERE email = $2", newPass, email)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "error", http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	n, _ := res.RowsAffected()
	if n == 0 {
		http.Error(w, "not found", http.StatusNotFound)
		return
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
